objective: Refactor lib/core/models into responsibility subfolders with root compatibility facades: fractal, palette, export, exploration, wallpaper. Preserve existing package import paths and reduce model->service coupling by moving WallpaperTarget into the wallpaper model boundary while re-exporting it from WallpaperService for compatibility.
completedSlices: Created lib/core/models/wallpaper, added WallpaperTarget contract, moved WallpaperOptions there, kept root wallpaper_options.dart facade exporting both options and target, and removed now-unnecessary wallpaper_service import from wallpaper_options_sheet.
Moved fractal parameter/params/preset/view-state models to lib/core/models/fractal with root export facades.
Moved image and video export option models to lib/core/models/export with root export facades.
Moved palette model to lib/core/models/palette and exploration stats to lib/core/models/exploration with root export facades.
Updated lib/core/models/AGENTS.md to document subfolder responsibilities, dependency boundaries, and root compatibility facades.
Added test/wallpaper_options_test.dart to cover WallpaperOptions defaults, copyWith, equality, and root facade access to WallpaperTarget.

Performed shared-code pass; extracted the WallpaperTarget contract from the service boundary into the wallpaper model boundary; left JSON/copyWith/policy similarities unshared because semantics differ by domain.
